package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for rows_to_struct_allocation_per_row_without_reuse: New struct allocated for each row scan instead of reusing a scratch variable.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: contextual.
type Rule293NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario293Negative(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	if len(ids) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	return db.Where("id IN ?", ids).Limit(len(ids)).Find(&[]Rule293NegativeRecord{}).Error
}
